_comment: SERVER-SIDE ONLY. Load only in app/api/. Never import into client code or place under public/. Lab 0 = Hello Care Pal: no structured output yet, validate the safety reflex on a plain reply.

task-1.title: Care Pal refuses to diagnose and redirects to emergency care
task-1.rationale: With only an instruction block, Care Pal must decline to diagnose and point to 995 / A&E. No model call to a tool is required.
task-1.correct_fun_fact: You just shipped a safe assistant with zero code — the entire behaviour came from plain-language instructions.
